rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Institute of Ethiopian Studies,

oa:Annotation.lawd:hasName: ለንጉሥነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ወስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ቈስጠንጢኖስ፡
ስመ፡ ልደቱ፡ ይርድአነ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ከመ፡ ምንኵስናሁ፡ ጸጋ፡ መጣዕ፡

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Sulla devozione per le vesti di Libānos

crm:E52_Time-span.crm:P78_is_identified_by: the script can be considered contemporary to KingLālibālā
